/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN & ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FILED,/X: DA MOTION TODETAIN IS DENIED,/NTW60/LDPX: 08-15-22(60)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING (HOME DETENTION)BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY ASFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS & COURT HEARINGS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: JOSE B,C, & JIAN JUN ZHAO/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
